channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: alirezarezvani /claude-skills | Python | N/A
item.description: 337 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.

item.title: CoplayDev /unity-mcp | C# | N/A
item.description: Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

item.title: mattpocock /skills | Shell | N/A
item.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

item.title: chthollyphile /folia-major | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: 专注于绚丽的歌词动画效果的本地音乐/navidrome/第三方网易云播放器

item.title: immich-app /immich | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

item.title: agentskills /agentskills | Python | N/A
item.description: Specification and documentation for Agent Skills

item.title: dotnet /skills | C# | N/A
item.description: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

item.title: ogulcancelik /herdr | Rust | N/A
item.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

item.title: rommapp /romm | Python | N/A
item.description: A beautiful, powerful, self-hosted rom manager and player.

item.title: asgeirtj /system_prompts_leaks | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

item.title: Zackriya-Solutions /meetily | Rust | N/A
item.description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai -https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

item.title: usestrix /strix | Python | N/A
item.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.

item.title: alibaba /page-agent | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

item.title: JuliusBrussee /caveman | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

item.title: openai /codex-plugin-cc | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.
